title: ICICI Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ICICI Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Bank:
ICICI Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank!
